interview_answers.tier_signals: multi-file feature, new module isolated, no schema migration cross-cutting, no auth/security/billing — solid M

events.reason: All evaluators unavailable (claude quota, gemini capacity, codex not installed). Architect performed self-review (round 1, 11 issues: 4 high, 4 medium, 3 low). Verdict: REVISE. External cross-model iprev still pending.

events.addresses: self-review issues 1-11 (filename UUID identity, send-to-prompt adapter, multi-row panel schema, own-write tracking, multi-instance downgrade, path-change semantics, trash epoch, pointer-events, background token, spec scaffold note, test list)

events.summary: Ctrl+L colision con terminal clear, falta path traversal validation, epoch vs mtime inconsistency, orphan DB rows on path change, dirty buffer flush race, tmp file location, watcher indexes everything, own-write 500ms not robust, ornamental claims (storage abstraction, custom naming, FloatingPanel wrapper, send-to-prompt seam), UX bear-trap renumbering, empty-state, off-screen rescue, Esc routing, DB migration mechanism, max tabs, xdg-open, purge toast, frontend test coverage.

Table name inconsistency carry-forward, hash race needs ring buffer, symlink check incomplete on read path, first-launch only covers no-path not missing-dir, ornamental heading, watcher leak on path change, tmp dotfile filter, frontend test gaps, DB version unspecified, hash sync read, off-screen on viewport change, epoch unit.

Test description carry-forward (fixed), regex pattern pinned, frontend test coverage narrow (deferred), off-screen on viewport change (deferred), rename-to-non-matching behavior (specified). All architectural blockers resolved. Extensibility hooks audit: all load-bearing claims have verifiable artifacts; provider abstraction explicitly disclaimed as non-hook.
